conversation.content: Good morning. I'm here to conduct the 0ras community supervision assessment with you today. This will help us understand your situation better, and develop, an appropriate supervision plan. I need you to be honest with me throughout this interview. Do you understand? Yes, I understand. I'll do my best to answer honestly. Let's start with some basic information. Can you please State your full name for the record? My name is Robert Johnson. Now, I need to ask you about your criminal history, tell me about the first time you were ever arrested. I was 23 years old. It was for shoplifting. Let's talk about your adult criminal record. How many times have you been convicted of a felony? None. I've only had misdemeanors. I'd now like to talk with you about your education employment and financial situation. What is the highest grade you completed? I graduated high school, got my diploma. Were you ever suspended or expelled from school? No, I was a pretty good student. Maybe got detention once or twice but nothing serious Where you working at the time of your arrest? Yes, I was working full-time at a warehouse. Are you currently employed? Yes, I'm still at the same job. My boss has been understanding about my situation. I now want to talk with you about your family.
